title: Integrate persist_ssn success path and common wipe in oscore_protect_request
description: After successful OSCORE option build (around line 1520), call oscore_ctx_persist_ssn(ctx). On OSCORE_OK from it, set ret=OSCORE_OK and goto common cleanup/wipe. On NVM failure, goto the NVM error path. Ensure the plaintext buffer, nonce, etc. are wiped in all paths before returning. Update function docs in oscore.h.
